summary: Visual-polish sprint verified end-to-end on the preview URL. All 12 acceptance criteria pass: collapsible sidebar (280→76, persists via localStorage metfpa_sidebar_collapsed), single-active nav item across the 5 direction_editor /plan-action variants, mobile off-canvas drawer at 390px with full labels + overlay + close-on-nav, KPI validation workspace de-purpled (white bg, green top border, dark text), no purple (#6E40C9) hits on /pilotage-directeur or /decisions, money format renders as 'X XXX,Y milliards FCFA' on /budget-consolide and Cabinet ⑤ (no Bn/Md), header cleaned (no global-search, no notifications-trigger), regression on /accueil, /pnd-402, /politique-eftp, /strategie-digitale, /alignement, /decisions, /risks all render header-title without errors, accessibility (sidebar-toggle aria-expanded toggles, collapsed nav-* gain title attr, keyboard focus reaches nav-cabinet).

sidebar_collapse_desktop.labels_hidden_when_collapsed: Cockpit METFPA text count goes from 1 to 0

single_active_item_DAF.issue_with_four_simultaneous_orange_butt: FIXED — verified exactly one aria-current=page nav-* item at every URL

role_navigation.cabinet_reader_landing: /pilotage-directeur OK; sidebar groups Pilotage + Progression stratégique + Référentiels
role_navigation.direction_editor_landing: /plan-action OK; 'Mon portefeuille de direction'; 5 DAF rows; 5 items in 'Ma Direction'

money_format./budget-consolide: samples: '240,4 milliards FCFA', '293,8 milliards FCFA', '5,6 milliards FCFA', '1 202,1 milliards FCFA'; 0 Bn/Md occurrences

institutional_brand.img_alt: Armoiries de la République de Côte d'Ivoire
institutional_brand.subtitle: Pilotage du secteur EFTP
institutional_brand.title: Cockpit METFPA

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx: matchMedia (max-width:1023px) handler correctly toggles isMobile; sidebar uses translate-x-full off-canvas + lg:translate-x-0 + dynamic marginLeft on the main column — clean and reactive on resize.

Sidebar.jsx SidebarItem active detection compares loc.pathname AND loc.search === (qs ? `?${qs}` : '') — this is what guarantees only one of the 5 direction_editor items lights up at a time. Verified empirically across /plan-action, ?vue=delayed, ?vue=updates, ?vue=alerts.

Sidebar collapsed state is hoisted to Layout; effectiveCollapsed = isMobile ? false : collapsed ensures the mobile drawer always renders full labels even when desktop preference is collapsed — correct UX.

Header.jsx renders header-sidebar-toggle vs mobile-menu-button based on isMobile prop — no overlap between the two buttons; previously reported global-search-input and notifications-trigger are confirmed removed.
KpiCascade validation-workspace verified at runtime: background rgb(255,255,255), border-top rgb(0,135,81) (var(--ci-green-600)), text rgb(24,33,47) (var(--ink-900)). Dark purple gradient is gone.
Money format: fmtMilliards across /budget-consolide outputs French-formatted '1 202,1 milliards FCFA' (NBSP thousand separator + comma decimal) — no 'Bn'/'Md' anywhere on audited pages.

Accessibility: aria-expanded on data-testid=sidebar-toggle flips correctly, and collapsed nav items expose accessible name through the title attribute (verified Pilotage Directeur on nav-cabinet). Focus styles are preserved via Tailwind defaults — adequate for keyboard navigation.
Minor maintenance: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references the older PND credentials (not the METFPA ones). Updating this file would prevent future testing agents from guessing.

Nit only: Sidebar group 'Ma Direction' separator border colors and the icon-rail spacing look balanced at 76px; if a future variant needs to remember a per-role default collapse, the single localStorage key is sufficient.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 12/12 acceptance criteria passed (collapse, persistence, single-active, mobile drawer, role landings, KPI workspace de-purpled, no purple, money format, direction portfolio, header cleanup, 7/7 regression pages, accessibility)

test_credentials: Cabinet: cabinet@metfpa.ci | Direction (DAF): direction.daf@metfpa.ci | M&E Validator: validateur@metfpa.ci | Admin: admin@metfpa.ci — all with Metfpa@2026Demo. Login testids: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: localStorage key for sidebar state is 'metfpa_sidebar_collapsed' (value '1' = collapsed, '0'/absent = expanded). Mobile breakpoint is max-width:1023px (matchMedia in Layout.jsx). Sidebar widths: 280 / 76. On mobile the drawer always renders full labels even if desktop preference was collapsed (effectiveCollapsed=false on mobile). Single-active nav detection compares pathname AND search (loc.search === (qs ? `?${qs}` : '')) — so direction_editor's 5 /plan-action variants light up exactly one at a time, and admin's nav-admin-users vs nav-roles (?tab=roles) also single-active. data-testid catalogue: sidebar, sidebar-toggle (footer), header-sidebar-toggle (header desktop), mobile-menu-button (header mobile), sidebar-overlay (mobile only), institutional-brand, validation-workspace, vw-missing/pending/nosource/incomplete, vw-list-*, cabinet-decisions, cabinet-kpis, cabinet-budget, activities-table, edit-activity-*, save-activity, header-title, header-role, user-menu-trigger, logout-button. Screenshots saved to /tmp/visual_polish/.
